title: The Power of Empowerment: Building Confident Teams
description: Discover how empowering your team members leads to better outcomes and a more engaged workplace culture.
transcript:
Welcome back to Two Admins and a Mic! Today we're talking about empowerment and how building confident teams transforms organizational culture...

Empowerment isn't just about delegating tasks—it's about giving people the authority, resources, and trust to make decisions on their own.

Thank you for listening!
showNotes: The difference between delegation and true empowerment
